title: Getting Started with ADS8192
code: library(ADS8192)  data("example_se", package = "ADS8192")  result <- ADS8192::run_heatmap_analysis(   se = example_se,   n_top = 500,   scale_method = "zscore",   gene_k = 5,   column_split_by = "strain" ) names(result) #> [1] "heatmap"       "scaled_matrix" "gene_modules" dim(result$gene_modules) #> [1] 500   2 head(result$gene_modules) #>            gene module #> 1 SPAC22A12.17c     M5 #> 2  SPAC23H3.15c     M4 #> 3    SPBC660.05     M4 #> 4  SPBC24C6.09c     M4 #> 5  SPCPB16A4.07     M4 #> 6   SPACUNK4.17     M4

title: Getting Started with ADS8192
code: result2 <- run_heatmap_analysis(   se = example_se,   n_top = 200,   scale_method = "minmax",   gene_k = 4,   column_split_by = "strain" ) head(result2$gene_modules) #>            gene module #> 1 SPAC22A12.17c     M1 #> 2  SPAC23H3.15c     M1 #> 3    SPBC660.05     M2 #> 4  SPBC24C6.09c     M1 #> 5  SPCPB16A4.07     M2 #> 6   SPACUNK4.17     M1

title: Authors and Citation
text: Kaur (2026). ADS8192: ADS 8192 Expression Heatmap Builder. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://github.com/akaur40/ADS8192.
code: @Manual{,   title = {ADS8192: ADS 8192 Expression Heatmap Builder},   author = {Abby Kaur},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/akaur40/ADS8192}, }

title: ADS 8192 Expression Heatmap Builder
text: package provides tools analyzing RNA-seq data fission yeast stress response experiment. includes functions following: - Normalize count data - Select top variable genes - Scale expression matrices - Generate annotated heatmaps - Extract gene modules - Export results

title: ADS 8192 Expression Heatmap Builder
text: can install development version ADS8192 GitHub :

title: ADS 8192 Expression Heatmap Builder
text: package provides command-line interface running analysis Install CLI launcher: CLI help: Fallback development usage: Example run:
code: ADS8192::install_ads8192_cli() #> created: C:\Users\akaur40\AppData\Local\Programs\R\Rapp\bin\ADS8192.bat (from package ADS8192) ADS8192 heatmap --help Rapp exec/ADS8192.R heatmap --help ADS8192 heatmap \   --input example \   --n_top 500\   --scale_method zscore \   --gene_k 5 \   --column_split_by strain \   --output_dir results/

title: Example fission yeast SummarizedExperiment — example_se
text: RNA-seq count data fission yeast stress response experiment. Includes sample metadata strain minute.

title: Example fission yeast SummarizedExperiment — example_se
text: SummarizedExperiment object : assays counts - raw count matrix colData sample metadata including strain minute

title: Export heatmap analysis results — export_results
text: Writes scaled expression matrix, per-gene module assignments, per-module gene lists tab-separated files output directory.

title: Export heatmap analysis results — export_results
text: mat_scaled scaled genes x samples matrix. module_df data frame containing gene--module assignments. output_dir Directory output files written.

title: Export heatmap analysis results — export_results
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data("example_se", package = "ADS8192") result <- run_heatmap_analysis(example_se) export_results(result$scaled_matrix, result$gene_modules, tempdir()) } # }

title: Install ADS8192 CLI launchers — install_ads8192_cli
text: Installs package CLI launcher(s) onto user's PATH using Rapp.

what: Run the full heatmap analysis pipeline — run_heatmap_analysis
title: Run the full heatmap analysis pipeline — run_heatmap_analysis
Run the full heatmap analysis pipeline — run_heatmap_analysis
code: run_heatmap_analysis(   se,   n_top = 500,   scale_method = "zscore",   gene_k = 5,   column_split_by = "strain",   output_dir = NULL )

title: Run the full heatmap analysis pipeline — run_heatmap_analysis
text: se SummarizedExperiment object. n_top Number top variable genes keep. scale_method Scaling method: "zscore", "minmax", "none". gene_k Number row k-means clusters. column_split_by Metadata column used sample splitting. output_dir Optional output directory TSV outputs.

title: Run the full heatmap analysis pipeline — run_heatmap_analysis
text: list containing heatmap, scaled matrix, gene module assignments.

title: Run the full heatmap analysis pipeline — run_heatmap_analysis
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data("example_se", package = "ADS8192") result <- run_heatmap_analysis(   se = example_se,   n_top = 100,   scale_method = "zscore",   gene_k = 5,   column_split_by = "strain" ) } # }
